title: IAnnounce
description: An easy way to announce your feelings
body:
# iAnnouncer
### Features:
- Send Announcements to all players with Titles and Messages
- Easy to configure by 'config.yml'
- Supports chat colors
- Custom Messages and Titles on Join and Quit
### Click here for commands and permissions
/announce (Message)
| Permission:
iannounce.announce

### Colour Codes
For people who don't know § = &
§4 Red
§c Rose
§6 Gold
§e Yellow
§2 Green
§a Lightgreen
§b Lightblue
§3 Cyan
§1 Navy
§9 Blue
§d Lightpurple
§5 Purple
§f White
§7 Lightgray
§8 Gray
§0 Black

### Variables

'%player%' - Will be replaced with the players display name that is receiving the message

### Useful Links
Jenkins (Development Builds Soon!)
**Plugin made with <3 - ThaYT**
